architecture.summary: Single file change in search.ts — 3 sort paths: edge KV, Postgres tsvector, Postgres ILIKE fallback. All must sort by githubStars DESC as primary factor.

integrations.summary: N/A — no new integrations, existing search infrastructure unchanged

ui-ux.summary: N/A — backend ranking fix only, no UI changes needed

performance.summary: N/A — sort order change only, no performance impact. Stars sort is simpler than blended formula.

security.summary: N/A — no security implications, read-only search ranking

edge-cases.summary: CERTIFIED-first ordering must be preserved across all 3 paths. Skills with 0 stars should sort last within their cert tier.
